title: Delicate Smoked Uruguayan Trout Curry
description: A cultured and silky Uruguayan dish featuring rainbow trout, nuka-pickle, and ovo-vegetarian-friendly ingredients, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe is made in a kadhai vessel.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kadhai vessel over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the smoked rainbow trout fillets and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Add the chopped nuka-pickle and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10 minutes.
Crack in the eggs and stir gently to distribute the eggs throughout the curry.
Season the curry with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
